mapper.select: SELECT txn_id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, gmt_complete, payer_account_id, payee_account_id, amount, currency, type, status, failure_reason, ext_info, category FROM transaction WHERE txn_id = #{txnId} AND (payer_account_id = #{accountId} OR payee_account_id = #{accountId}) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction ( txn_id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, gmt_complete, payer_account_id, payee_account_id, amount, currency, type, status, failure_reason, ext_info, category ) VALUES ( #{txnId}, NOW(), NOW(), #{gmtComplete}, #{payerAccountId}, #{payeeAccountId}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{type}, #{status}, #{failureReason}, #{extInfo}, #{category} )
